svg.title: Vehicle Rental Business Scenario
svg.desc: End-to-end business scenario showing a customer making a vehicle reservation, involving staff, payment gateway, notification service, and database.
svg.text: Customer self-service flow with system and external actors

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the vehicle search step in the rental system')
sendPrompt('How does the vehicle search work in the system?')
sendPrompt('What does the database return during vehicle search?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a customer selects a vehicle?')
sendPrompt('How does the system check vehicle availability?')
sendPrompt('How is vehicle availability stored in the database?')
sendPrompt('What information does a customer enter when making a reservation?')
sendPrompt('How does the system validate reservation inputs?')
sendPrompt('How does a customer pay for a vehicle reservation?')
sendPrompt('How does the system handle payment securely?')
sendPrompt('What does the payment gateway do in the reservation system?')
sendPrompt('How does the system confirm a reservation?')
sendPrompt('What records are saved to the database on reservation confirmation?')
sendPrompt('How does the system update vehicle availability?')
sendPrompt('How is vehicle availability tracked in the database?')
sendPrompt('What triggers the confirmation notification to the customer?')
sendPrompt('What does the notification service send to the customer?')
sendPrompt('What does the customer receive after booking is confirmed?')
